label: Konami code
summary: The cheat code, and a 30-second party mode.
era: Up up down down left right left right B A: the most-typed secret on Earth.

options.name: href
options.note: navigate to a secret page on the code, instead of party mode

options.name: words
options.note: comma-separated secret words that also trigger the egg when typed

a11y: Loading the widget adds Retrostrap.konami.on(seq, fn) and .trigger(). Party mode composes only non-flashing widgets and stays in budget; under reduced motion it declines with a small note. A ten-tap gesture is the touch alternative.
